pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which dynamically generates this specification file.
Verified by reading the instructions in setup_task.sh which explicitly require this download directory.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which requests enabling Web Platform, Parallel downloading, QUIC (1=enabled) and disabling Smooth Scrolling, Auto Dark Mode (2=disabled).
Verified by checking setup_task.sh which instructs creating custom search engines with these exact keywords and domains.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly lists Default font size: 18, Fixed-width: 15, and Minimum: 12.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which requires these 3 URLs to open on startup.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for chrome_env_all perf_testing_browser_config task by confirming that the specification file is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected download directory, Chrome experimental flags (enabling web-platform, parallel downloading, quic and disabling smooth-scrolling, force-dark), custom search engines (mdn, npm, gh, can), font sizes (default 18, fixed 15, minimum 12), and startup URLs explicitly match the generated instructions. Additionally, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because the success specification points to a non-existent script.
